documentation.content: PrismaClientRustPanicError indicates the Prisma query engine crashed. This is distinct from normal database errors (P-codes, init failures, query syntax errors). Investigate immediately — may indicate a corrupted query, OOM in the engine subprocess, or an engine bug. The catch-all Prisma branch in packages/backend/src/middleware/errorHandler.ts logs the full Prisma context (errorName, prismaCode, meta, path, requestId); start there. Metric source: log-based counter verifymyprovider_prisma_rust_panic.
